title: Baker Ross AG781 Rainbow Unicorn Foam (Pack of 120) Self Adhesive Puffy Scrapbook Stickers for Kids Arts and Crafts Projects, Paper, Assorted
features: Enchanting unicorn foam stickers ideal for adding magic to your makes with this pack of stickers, perfect to decorate cards, crafts and collage
These fun stickers for kids are made from foam, making it easy for little ones to handle, improving hand eye coordination and dexterity
Multicoloured random stickers with an adhesive back, so no glue is needed Glue free, mess free, fuss free
These amazing stickers come in fun paper stickers in assorted designs in white/ pink/ purple/ blue/ yellow unicorn and more

Made by experts: Baker Ross has been designing and providing the very best art and craft supplies, and toys to schools, groups and parents for over 40 years. All products conform to General Product Safety Regulations, and state age recommendation where applicable.
description: From the manufacturer Baker Ross - Inspiring creativity for over 50 years! Co-founded in 1974 by Patti Baker, Baker Ross is still a family owned and run business whose innovative ideas led them to become one of the leading suppliers of arts and crafts, toys and party supplies to parents, schools, playgroups and organisations in the UK and beyond. Baker Ross currently offer over 4,000 items, with over 75% of their products designed in-house by their creative team. Baker Ross offers a brilliant range of crafts, toys and party supplies, specifically designed for kids both big and small to have lots of fun creating, learning and playing. What Baker Ross has to offer Arts and Crafts Baker Ross offers a great range of general arts and crafts supplies, including pens, paints, paper, glues, crayons, pencils and lots more! The range also includes crafting accessories such as brushes, aprons, table covers, scissors and many more useful tools. Craft Kits Baker Ross also supplies a wide range of different creative craft kits for different seasons, occasions, STEM and popular themes such as unicorns, dinosaurs and mermaid. These kits encompass a range of different crafting techniques so kids can practice sewing, painting, colouring, modelling, and many other creative techniques. Party Bag Fillers Keep kids entertained for hours with Baker Ross fun toys and party bag fillers. These small toys are great for kids’ parties, as lucky dip prizes, loot bag fillers and much more! Check out the range of soft toys, activity books, stationary, bubbles, bouncy balls and pocket money toys. Party Supplies Baker Ross has everything you need to throw a fantastic theme party. The range includes party tableware sets and loot bags for popular themes such as dinosaurs, unicorns, mermaid, pirates and more! The party sets include table covers, napkins, cups, balloons and other fun party accessories including pinatas, gift bags and fun toys
